item.title: LibreWolf
item.description: A custom version of Firefox, focused on privacy, security and freedom.

item.title: GoofCord
item.description: Take control of your Discord experience with GoofCord – the highly configurable and privacy-focused Discord client

item.title: KopiaUI
item.description: Cross-platform backup tool

item.title: ungoogled-chromium
item.description: ungoogled-chromium is Google Chromium, sans dependency on Google web services.

item.title: ownCloud
item.description: Open-source software for highly secure, borderless collaboration and filesharing on any device

item.title: Zen Browser
item.description: Performance-optimized and privacy-focused browser built atop Firefox

item.title: Tuta
item.description: Email service with a strong focus on security and privacy that lets you encrypt emails, contacts and calendar entries on all your devices.

item.title: Legcord
item.description: Legcord is a custom client designed to enhance your Discord experience while keeping everything lightweight

item.title: Wire
item.description: Wire is the most secure platform for messaging, audio, and video calls, based on edge computing and zero knowledge architecture.

item.title: Ricochet Refresh
item.description: Anonymous peer-to-peer instant messaging

item.title: FireDragon
item.description: A Floorp fork with custom branding and opinionated settings.

item.title: SimpleX Chat
item.description: First messaging platform that has no user identifiers of any kind

item.title: Jitsi Meet
item.description: Secure, Simple and Scalable Video Conferences that you use as a standalone app or embed in your web application.

item.title: Follow
item.description: Next generation information browser

item.title: Nextcloud
item.description: Nextcloud is the industry-leading, fully open-source, on-premises content collaboration platform.

item.title: Telegram Web A
item.description: An experimental standalone version of Telegram Web Client A.

item.title: Chatterino2
item.description: Chat client for Twitch.tv

item.title: WebCord
item.description: A Discord and SpaceBar :electron:-based client implemented without Discord API.

item.title: qBittorrent-Enhanced-Edition
item.description: qBittorrent is a bittorrent client programmed in C++ / Qt

item.title: Darktable
item.description: darktable is an open source photography workflow application and raw developer

item.title: RSS Guard
item.description: Simple RSS/ATOM feed reader

item.title: Delta Chat Desktop
item.description: Email-based instant messaging for Desktop.

item.title: Filen
item.description: Desktop client for filen.io.

item.title: Session
item.description: Session Desktop - Onion routing based messenger.

item.title: Vesktop
item.description: Vesktop is a custom Discord App aiming to give you better performance and improve linux support

item.title: Cardo
item.description: Cardo is a podcast client for desktop

item.title: Caprine
item.description: Caprine is an unofficial and privacy-focused Facebook Messenger app with many useful features

item.title: Hiddify
item.description: Multi-user anti-filtering panel, with an effortless installation and supporting more than 20 protocols to circumvent filtering plus the telegram proxy.

item.title: ente Photos
item.description: End-to-end encryption for photos and more.

item.title: SchildiChat
item.description: Matrix client / Element Desktop fork.

item.title: Vieb
item.description: Vim Inspired Electron Browser

item.title: Catalyst
item.description: A lightweight and user-focused web browser powered by Electron

item.title: Miru
item.description: Stream anime torrents, real-time with no waiting for downloads

item.title: Cinny
item.description: Matrix client focusing primarly on simple, elegant and secure interface

item.title: Beeper
item.description: Beeper is a universal chat app. With Beeper, you can send and receive messages to friends, family and colleagues on 14 different chat networks, all from a single app.

item.title: Ferdium
item.description: All your services in one place, built by the community.

item.title: Equibop
item.description: Equibop is a fork of Vesktop.

item.title: Frigoligo
item.description: Frigoligo is a wallabag client crafted using Flutter

item.title: Localsend
item.description: Open source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

item.title: FreeTube
item.description: FreeTube is an open source desktop YouTube player built with privacy in mind

item.title: Thorium
item.description: Chromium fork for linux, includes Widevine, All Codecs, Chrome Plugins, as well as thinLTO, CFlag, LDFlag, LLVM Loop, and PGO compiler optimizations

item.title: Wireguard GUI
item.description: A wireguard client GUI for Linux made with nextauri

item.title: Linphone
item.description: Linphone is an open source SIP phone for voice/video calls, instant messaging and conference calling

item.title: Datcord
item.description: An open-source Discord client using Firefox

item.title: Wavebox
item.description: Connect all the apps and websites you need to run your business and stay signed-in to every account

item.title: Outline Client
item.description: A cross-platform proxy client

item.title: Axolotl
item.description: Complete cross-platform Signal client
